frozen_policy: This schema is frozen before KB ingestion. Any change requires a new major version and invalidates downstream retrieval experiments.

doc_id.description: Kebab-case identifier; must equal the markdown filename without extension.

attack_family.description: Primary botnet family the document is about; 'generic' for family-agnostic material.

attack_types.description: Specific N-BaIoT attack classes the document addresses; empty for generic or off-dataset material.

device_categories.description: Device categories the document applies to; ['generic'] when device-agnostic. Categories outside this enum (e.g. routers, TVs) map to 'generic'.

doc_type.description: Functional role of the document in report generation.

is_distractor.description: True for deliberately off-target documents seeded to make retrieval fallible. Must appear ONLY in metadata, never in doc_id, title, or body text (it would leak into embeddings).

retrieval_filtering_note: Metadata filtering at retrieval time uses attack_family and device_categories, applied per report section as a soft preference (not a hard filter), so generic remediation documents remain reachable.
